name: Apple Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour apple pie filling into a 9-inch pie plate.
2. Dot with butter.
3. Sprinkle with lemon juice and cinnamon.
4. Place in oven set to 400°F for about 10 minutes, or until the mixture is hot and bubbly.
5. Meanwhile, combine biscuit mix and 1 tbsp softened butter. Stir in milk.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the biscuit batter onto the hot apple filling.
7. Continue baking at 400°F for 20-25 minutes, or until biscuits are done.
8. Serve warm with cream.
